name: External Disk Drive Or USB Storage Device Was Recognized By The System
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Keith Wright
SIGMA Title: External Disk Drive Or USB Storage Device Was Recognized By The System
SIGMA Description: Detects external disk drives or plugged-in USB devices.

False positives:
- Likely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6416 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%diskdrive%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%usb mass storage device%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY External Disk Drive Or USB Storage Device Was Recognized By The System on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6416 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%diskdrive%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%usb mass storage device%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: External Disk Drive Or USB Storage Device Was Recognized By The System
